title: HR Dashboard
summary: Power BI dashboard tracking workforce composition, attrition trends, and key HR performance indicators.
overview: An HR performance dashboard designed to provide leadership with a single view of workforce and people metrics.
businessProblem: HR teams were using disconnected reports, making trend analysis and strategic planning difficult.
objective: Centralize core HR KPIs and create an interactive reporting experience for faster decision-making.
process: Modeled employee data, built retention and attrition measures in DAX, and designed drill-ready visuals by segment.
insights: Highlighted teams with elevated attrition and revealed tenure patterns linked to employee exits.
outcome: Improved HR reporting consistency and enabled more targeted people strategy discussions.
challenges: Required careful cleanup of workforce records to standardize department and role fields.
nextSteps: Add predictive attrition signals and workforce planning scenarios.

title: HR Metric & Insights
summary: Interactive HR insights report focused on engagement, headcount movements, and departmental performance.
overview: An HR intelligence report offering metric-level visibility into staffing and workforce dynamics.
businessProblem: Leaders needed faster access to KPI-level HR intelligence without waiting for manual report preparation.
objective: Provide clear metric visibility and self-service filtering for management and HR stakeholders.
process: Created reusable metric calculations, standardized dimensions, and built role-based analysis views.
insights: Revealed key metrics that fluctuated by business unit and highlighted hiring pressure points.
outcome: Supported quicker HR reviews and improved stakeholder confidence in reported numbers.
challenges: Aligning KPI definitions across teams required several validation rounds.
nextSteps: Add monthly KPI variance alerts and narrative commentary cards.

title: Customer Satisfaction
summary: Power BI satisfaction report monitoring survey scores, sentiment patterns, and service touchpoint performance.
overview: A customer feedback dashboard that tracks satisfaction outcomes across channels and service interactions.
businessProblem: Customer experience teams lacked an integrated view of satisfaction performance and recurring pain points.
objective: Create a dashboard that connects scores, trends, and service dimensions in one view.
process: Prepared survey data, cleaned response categories, and designed trend and segment-level visuals.
insights: Identified recurring low-score patterns in specific customer journey stages.
outcome: Helped teams prioritize customer experience improvements with clearer issue visibility.
challenges: Feedback data had inconsistent labels requiring normalization.
nextSteps: Integrate text sentiment analysis and action tracking metrics.

title: Healthcare Claims & Payer Mix Dashboard
summary: Executive healthcare analytics dashboard focused on claims trends, payer distribution, and reimbursement mix performance.
overview: An executive dashboard built to track healthcare claims activity, payer mix, and utilization patterns across reporting periods.
businessProblem: Revenue cycle teams needed a unified view of claims volume, payer dependency, and reimbursement exposure to guide strategic decisions.
objective: Provide clear visibility into claims trends and payer distribution so stakeholders can reduce risk and improve financial performance.
process: Prepared claims and payer datasets, modeled payer-category KPIs, and designed interactive visuals for trend, split, and utilization analysis.
insights: Highlighted strong dependence on government payers and surfaced differences in claims intensity across payer categories.
outcome: Improved decision support for payer strategy, contract planning, and operational prioritization in revenue cycle management.
challenges: Harmonizing payer labels and balancing high-level executive metrics with detailed operational views.
nextSteps: Add denial-rate monitoring, reimbursement variance analysis, and predictive alerts for payer-risk changes.

title: Customer Loyalty Dashboard
summary: Loyalty analytics report exploring repeat behavior, segment value, and retention opportunities.
overview: A customer loyalty dashboard built to evaluate retention, repeat purchasing, and high-value segments.
businessProblem: Marketing teams lacked a clear lens into loyalty behavior and segment quality.
objective: Provide actionable loyalty metrics that support campaign and customer strategy planning.
process: Built customer cohort metrics, designed segment visuals, and implemented trend analysis pages.
insights: Identified loyalty segment shifts and highlighted under-engaged high-potential groups.
outcome: Improved campaign targeting decisions and retention strategy prioritization.
challenges: Customer identities needed additional deduplication logic for accurate counts.
nextSteps: Add campaign response overlays and customer lifetime value modeling.

title: Christmas Sales Analysis
summary: Seasonal sales report analyzing holiday revenue patterns, top categories, and performance drivers.
overview: A holiday-focused sales intelligence report for evaluating campaign and product performance.
businessProblem: Business teams needed to understand seasonal sales behavior to improve next-cycle planning.
objective: Deliver clear insights into peak-period performance and opportunity gaps.
process: Combined transactional sales data, built time-series KPIs, and designed category and region analysis.
insights: Showed specific product lines and channels driving seasonal uplift.
outcome: Supported more strategic holiday planning and promotion optimization.
challenges: Historical campaign mapping was incomplete for some periods.
nextSteps: Add promotion-level ROI analysis and stock planning indicators.

title: Smartphones Sales Overview
summary: Sales intelligence dashboard analyzing smartphone transactions, pricing, channel performance, and brand outcomes.
overview: A smartphone sales dashboard built to provide a complete view of commercial performance and customer buying trends.
businessProblem: Commercial teams needed better visibility into unit sales distribution, channel contribution, and pricing behavior.
objective: Deliver a dashboard that supports tactical and strategic decisions for sales and product planning.
process: Modeled transaction data, built channel and brand KPIs, and designed drill-down visuals for geography and customer groups.
insights: Identified top-performing channels and highlighted age-group demand patterns for targeted campaigns.
outcome: Improved clarity on sales drivers and provided a stronger basis for pricing and distribution decisions.
challenges: Balancing dashboard detail with executive-level readability across multiple metric views.
nextSteps: Add forecasting and promotion impact simulations for planning cycles.

title: Real Estate Sales Performance Dashboard
summary: Power BI dashboard tracking listings, property sales, neighborhood pricing, and market movement indicators.
overview: A real estate performance dashboard created to monitor sales outcomes, active listings, and property price behavior.
businessProblem: Teams lacked a unified view of market performance across neighborhoods, listing types, and pricing segments.
objective: Provide a centralized dashboard for tracking sales velocity and price distribution trends.
process: Prepared listing and transaction datasets, defined market metrics, and built comparative visuals by area and property type.
insights: Revealed neighborhoods with stronger volume performance and segments with pricing pressure.
outcome: Enabled more data-driven pricing and listing strategy decisions.
challenges: Harmonizing data from multiple real estate sources with differing field definitions.
nextSteps: Add buyer segmentation and demand trend forecasting layers.

title: Oil Financial and Operational Performance Dashboard
summary: Operational and financial dashboard monitoring well performance, revenue drivers, cost efficiency, and profitability trends.
overview: A performance dashboard designed to monitor oil and gas revenue, operational costs, and top-performing wells.
businessProblem: Operations and finance teams needed a clearer combined view of profitability and production efficiency.
objective: Unify operational and financial performance metrics in one decision-ready dashboard.
process: Integrated well-level production and finance data, modeled efficiency ratios, and designed operator and profitability views.
insights: Highlighted high-performing wells and surfaced cost-to-revenue opportunities across operators.
outcome: Improved visibility for production planning and financial optimization discussions.
challenges: Aligning finance and operations definitions for consistent KPI interpretation.
nextSteps: Add anomaly detection and scenario-based production forecasting.

title: Exploratory Analysis with Titanic Dataset
summary: Exploratory data analysis and classification model comparison using the Titanic dataset.
overview: A notebook-based exploratory and comparative modeling project on Titanic survival prediction.
businessProblem: The goal was to understand feature relationships and compare model performance in a binary classification scenario.
objective: Explore data quality, engineer useful features, and benchmark baseline classification approaches.
process: Performed EDA, handled missing values, visualized distributions, and compared multiple classifiers.
insights: Found strong predictive signals in passenger class, fare, and age-related features.
outcome: Produced a practical model comparison framework and interpretable exploratory findings.
challenges: Balancing model complexity with interpretability for educational clarity.
nextSteps: Expand with cross-validation, feature selection, and probability calibration.

title: Exploratory Analysis with Wine Dataset
summary: Python-based exploratory analysis of wine quality patterns and variable relationships.
overview: A structured exploratory analysis project on a real wine dataset to understand quality drivers.
businessProblem: Needed to identify variable patterns and quality relationships in tabular product data.
objective: Build an evidence-based understanding of feature influence and data distribution behavior.
process: Executed cleaning, descriptive analysis, correlation checks, and multivariate visual exploration.
insights: Highlighted key physicochemical attributes with stronger associations to wine quality.
outcome: Generated a reliable exploration baseline for downstream predictive modeling.
challenges: Addressing skewed distributions and outliers without over-distorting signal.
nextSteps: Develop regression and classification follow-up models from the engineered dataset.

title: Linear Regression with Real Estate Dataset
summary: Regression modeling project predicting real estate values from structured property features.
overview: An applied linear regression notebook focused on interpreting drivers of real estate pricing.
businessProblem: Estimate property prices more consistently and identify major value determinants.
objective: Train and evaluate a baseline regression model with interpretable outputs.
process: Prepared features, split training/test data, trained linear model, and evaluated error metrics.
insights: Observed the strongest directional relationships among location and property characteristic features.
outcome: Produced a transparent regression baseline suitable for iterative model improvement.
challenges: Handling multicollinearity and feature scaling considerations.
nextSteps: Compare regularized and non-linear alternatives to improve predictive accuracy.

title: ETL Pipeline for Automated Excel File Processing
summary: Automation project for ingesting, transforming, and processing Excel data through a reusable ETL workflow.
overview: A Python automation pipeline built to streamline repetitive Excel-based data preparation tasks.
businessProblem: Manual file processing was time-consuming and prone to inconsistencies.
objective: Automate data extraction and transformation to reduce effort and improve reliability.
process: Designed a modular ETL flow for reading files, applying transformations, and exporting cleaned outputs.
insights: Automation significantly reduced turnaround time for recurring data preparation cycles.
outcome: Improved data readiness and reduced repetitive manual operations.
challenges: Supporting diverse Excel formats while keeping the pipeline maintainable.
nextSteps: Add scheduling, logging dashboards, and alerting for failed runs.

title: Elroilytics Website
summary: Corporate website design and development focused on brand clarity, service presentation, and lead conversion.
overview: A business website built to communicate service value clearly and present a credible digital presence.
businessProblem: The business needed a modern and trustworthy website to improve online visibility and client confidence.
objective: Design and deploy a clean, responsive, and conversion-oriented website aligned with the brand.
process: Planned information architecture, designed responsive layouts, implemented frontend pages, and refined user flow.
insights: Clear content hierarchy and concise service messaging improved readability and user engagement.
outcome: Delivered a professional web presence that better supports marketing and client discovery.
challenges: Balancing visual appeal with performance and content clarity across devices.
nextSteps: Add structured case studies and analytics-driven content optimization.

title: Dominion City Global Services Website
summary: Service-focused website developed to showcase offerings, strengthen credibility, and support inquiry generation.
overview: A corporate site designed to communicate capabilities and make it easier for prospects to engage with the brand.
businessProblem: The organization required a stronger online presence to present services professionally and attract opportunities.
objective: Create a modern, responsive website with clear navigation and accessible service information.
process: Defined page structure, implemented responsive components, optimized layouts, and tuned content presentation.
insights: Simple navigation and strong visual hierarchy improved how quickly users understood key services.
outcome: Improved brand credibility and provided a clearer digital channel for client communication.
challenges: Maintaining consistency in design and messaging across multiple service pages.
nextSteps: Integrate stronger conversion tracking and SEO performance monitoring.
